problem.title: Largest Number
problem.description: Given a list of non-negative integers nums, arrange them such that they form the largest number and return it.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Custom Comparator
solutions.description: Convert each integer to a string and sort using a custom comparator that compares the two possible concatenation orders (b+a vs a+b). Placing the concatenation that yields the larger string first ensures the overall number is maximized. The edge case where all numbers are zero is handled by checking if the first sorted element is "0".
